improved: Opening speed presets are reduced for Fast, Balanced, and Safe as the accepted v0.3.3 performance fix (UF-2026-04-12, variant A)
Popup/help copy uses macOS terminology (Option, Control) to reduce first-run confusion
fixed: Right-click lasso no longer leaves the browser context menu over a successful gesture (UF-2026-05-07)
Existing tabs are checked with a version-aware content runtime marker during update re-injection, reducing stale-script reload-like behavior after extension update (UF-2026-05-22)
notes: UF-2026-05-04 is intentionally released as a controlled known risk for v0.3.3
Released to production after Chrome Web Store approval on 2026-06-19

added: Release update notice in popup for existing users with one-click access to What changed
Expanded first-run setup checklist in popup for new users
Direct full welcome guide link in setup/help flows (https://o1756795.github.io/snap-links-chrome/)
improved: Existing user behavior is preserved on update: saved mouse button, modifier, action mode, and startup preference are kept as-is
Update banner copy now explicitly states that current workflow stays unchanged
Help modal now includes a clearer step-by-step usage guide for new installs
fixed: Selection precision workflow finalized for release (Strict/Touch, Strict by default) (UF-2026-03-10)
Mouse-only activation path (No modifier) finalized for release without regressing modifier-based workflows (UF-2026-03-13)
Yandex Browser opening mode routing finalized for release (Open in new tabs and Open one new window with tabs) (UF-2026-04-09)

added: Default selection action model (open tabs / open windows / one window with tabs)
First-run setup state (setupCompleted) with explicit setup completion flow
Fast action-mode switch command: cycle-default-selection-action
Alt+S keyboard shortcut auto-assigned on install (suggested_key in manifest)
Alt+Shift+S speech bubble toast showing new action mode after each switch
Extension auto-enables on first install (trackingEnabled: true, autoEnable: true)
On-page confirmation toast after lasso selection ('N links opened')
improved: Popup redesigned for one-button daily use: compact main panel + hidden settings
Help content now reflects the current mouse/modifier/action configuration
Selection flow executes saved default action immediately after drag selection
First-run setup now saves settings, turns selection on, and returns the user to the page in one step
Popup now reflects live storage updates for action mode, setup state, and successful-selection progress
Theme-aware icon sync is now triggered on install/startup and on active tab/window changes
Tilda onboarding page includes a visual step-by-step guide
First-run install tab opens the GitHub Pages welcome page (https://o1756795.github.io/snap-links-chrome/)
Popup hint text: modifier and mouse button highlighted in bold, action destination highlighted in bold
Popup shortcuts block shows both shortcuts (activate + cycle) with real assigned keys
Welcome page copy updated to 'already ON' concept - no manual setup steps required
fixed: Large bulk selections now require confirmation before action execution (25+ links)
E2E checks migrated from modal visibility to storage-based selection result verification
Added dedicated E2E coverage for first-run setup through popup.html
Welcome page hosted on GitHub Pages with Hero, Try It, Pin It, and Troubleshooting sections
New windows now open focused (visible) instead of in the background
Native text selection is now cleared only on actual lasso start, fixing Copy/right-click conflict while extension is enabled (UF-2026-03-11)
Startup state now explicitly syncs trackingEnabled with autoEnable so Off remains OFF on browser startup (UF-2026-03-12)

added: Activation modifier setting in popup (none/Alt/Shift/Ctrl)
Optional auto-enable on browser startup
Quick guide block in popup for first-time users
Automated cws-pack build with minification
Need help? modal with an in-popup troubleshooting checklist
Product improvement suggestions link in popup footer (Google Form)
Collapsible 'How to select links' section with persisted expanded/collapsed state
improved: Lasso reliability on dynamic pages with DOM changes
Selection performance with cached geometry and rAF throttling
Popup/settings UX and configuration persistence
Popup first-run UX with explicit ON/OFF state and action-oriented guide text
Popup guide now starts with explicit 'make sure selection is ON' step
Popup width increased to 368px with side-by-side setup cards and a full-width primary action
Activation settings now stack the label above the select, with simpler startup wording
First-run defaults are now Left Mouse Button + Alt + drag
Tilda onboarding instructions updated to 7-step flow with Extensions icon and pinning
Historical records synchronized for this release cycle: implementation and verification were run on Lenovo (D:\claude\chrome_ext\snap-links)
fixed: User tabs are no longer mass-reloaded on extension update
Ghost links from detached DOM nodes are filtered out
Multiple lasso edge cases around mouseup/blur handling
Compatibility fixes for link hit-testing on complex layouts
User-facing popup copy no longer references modal jargon
Rating prompt now unlocks after five successful selections
E2E runner retries dynamic-links scenario instead of skipping on modal timing instability
E2E auto-enable verification now uses deterministic service-worker fallback when onStartup is not observed

added: New lasso selection algorithm
Real-time link count preview
improved: Improved performance
fixed: Fixed selection on pages with scrolling
Corrected coordinate calculation

added: Initial release
Basic link selection functionality
Single mouse button support
